underlying_goal: Understand why a PruneTranscriptDataTask processed 119 items when only 111 were passed in
friction_detail: Claude kept guessing explanations (input parsing, pause/resume overlap, GoodJob interruption) that the user rejected each time, rather than investigating the actual code/data.
brief_summary: User wanted to understand why their maintenance task processed more items than expected; Claude offered multiple incorrect guesses that the user rejected before finally suggesting actual investigation.
